statement: Moving apply/requeue routing out of `llm_job_service`/`llm_batch_service` into an orchestrator-owned request lifecycle module will simplify adding new target types and reduce boundary leakage.
rationale: Execution services currently resolve handlers and requeue requests directly, duplicating orchestration responsibilities.
keyAssumptions: Execution services can return neutral results without breaking workflows
validationCriteria: New target type requires changes in only one registry layer
critiquePoints: Refactor may touch many call sites and tests
questions: Which layer should own retry policy decisions: scheduler or domain service?
